framework.name: Human-Mediated Discovery as Gateway to Agent-to-Agent
framework.description: Contrarian take: Agent-to-agent coordination protocols (A2A, AutoGen) may be premature. DIRA's success (100k MAU) suggests human-curated discovery and evaluation creates the trust layer that ENABLES autonomous coordination later. Agents need reputation before they can transact autonomously. Bottom-up approach: humans establish quality signals, then agents inherit them.
framework.raw_quote: we started as a directory... kept growing organically... last month more than 100,000 monthly active users

source.title: AI Agents, Marketplaces, and Real Utility Tokens — Building DIRA with $DIRA
